只是他没有想到的是，同时他的灵魂也被创成了无数份。
......
陆泽已加入群聊
......
火影陆泽：芜湖，外挂终于到了，兄弟们都穿哪了？
海军陆泽：谢邀，人在海贼王，是基地上校。
星铁陆泽：谢邀，人在星穹铁道，是令使。
宝可梦陆泽：谢邀，人在宝可梦，是神兽。
龙族陆泽：谢邀，人在龙族，是大学生。
......
火影陆泽想到自己还得面对灭族之夜。
不是，就哥们一个人在绝地求生是吧？！
......
已有世界：崩坏星穹铁道，海贼王，火影忍者，宝可梦，龙族，部落冲突，尼尔机械纪元，虹猫蓝兔七侠传，剑与远征，巴啦啦小魔仙，时空猎人，4399龙斗士，迪迦奥特曼，fate，宇宙星神，星游记，绝区零，王者荣耀，斗龙战士，英雄联盟音乐宇宙，原神，鸣潮......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a985c9190b1143eb3c00bec98630dad5","author":"横鳞","author_id":"","book_id":"7529540229431036990","book_name":"同时穿越：智识令使才是真外挂？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202850","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":381,"name":"聊天群","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=381&name=聊天群&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7529540384226034238","read_count":"42431","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1238138"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"451","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,聊天群,综漫,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3258c5406509a05cfc9268f741dc00d0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779384102&x-signature=beYHuWl4w8u8YgNpY3%2F00e26%2FZ0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3548863366704631","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"50"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323012142A2F5F82DC7348BA5B275"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":
